title: Process Engineer Vacancy at ABB India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Process Engineer Vacancy at ABB India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Process Engineer looking for your next big career move? ABB India in Surat offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About ABB India:
ABB India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Life and accident insurance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Surat, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with ABB India!
